title: SI-traceable calibration of elemental mercury gas generators
author: de krom, Iris
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: During the SI-Hg project a metrological traceable protocol for the calibration of mercury gas generators used in the field was developed and validated. The SI-Hg calibration protocol specifies the procedures for establishing traceability to the SI units for the quantitative output of elemental mercury generators that are employed in regulatory applications for emission monitoring or testing. This protocol provides methods for the experimental procedures to compare the output of elemental mercury gas generators the data processing for determination of mercury concentration and the expanded uncertainty of the mercury concentration obtained from the elemental mercury gas generator. In the protocol examples are given to explain the data processing, determining the mercury concentration and corresponding uncertainty. In this repository the raw data and results used for the example calculated with the data processing script can be found.
